topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Dart. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Mobile App Developer roles.
whyItMatters: Dart is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Dart in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Dart snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Dart?
How does Dart handle memory management?
